title: scrofella chinensis
intro: Scrofella chinensis, also known as the Chinese scorpion orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-viral effects. The health benefits of Scrofella chinensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as other conditions like rheumatism and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Scrofella chinensis is often used in the form of dried roots, decoctions, or infusions, and is also combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
